Session 1 	Session 2 	Session 3 	Session 4 	Session 5 	Session 6
In this training, Teresa is going to walk you step by step through the attendee communication between the time someone signs up for your event and
the actual first day. This is a very important session designed to help keep your audience excited for what they originally committed too. Your main
goal is to get them to not only show up but to show up prepared and excited!
S E S S I O N O V E R V I E W
TAKE NOTES
ACTION STEPS
Create your invitation email with all the details Teresa laid out in her video.
Think through the breadcrumb trail you can create leading up to your event.
Create a webpage or google doc with all the information in one place for your attendees.
Make sure you do your two week courtesy call.
If you want, have some gifts ready for your attendees when they show up.
Create networking opportunities for your attendees like FB groups, dinners, etc.
